text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Happy New Year, Teach! Here's to another good
one!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's January first, and Hishi Amazon has come to
my office to greet me for the new year.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Anyway, let's get this started!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She begins to line up a variety of mochi on my
desk, one after another.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
I've brought some sweet bean mochi, mugwort
mochi—oh, and these ones have brown sugar in
them, so be careful not to make a mess.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
And you can't start off the year without some
kagami mochi! Look, the mandarin on top of it
still has its leaf and everything!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Kagami mochi are traditionally decorated with
bitter oranges, not mandarins, but I keep that to
myself and just appreciate her thoughtfulness.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The selection of mochi is wonderful and leaves
nothing to be desired. It's so like Hishi Amazon to
be this attentive and considerate.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, right? These were made at the mochi
pounding competition we had back at Miho
Dormitory. We hold it for the students who
decide to stay on campus for break.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
The moment my dorm residents knew I would be
bringing these to you, they put their all into
making them!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
I gotta lead by example and make this year one
to remember so they have something to aspire to!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's about time we cement which races we want to
pursue this year.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I ask her whether she would prefer to run the
Triple Crown tour or the Tiara tour and wait for
her answer.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Huh?! Oh, you're right! I just about forgot those
tour thingies existed!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Haha, sorry about that. I only have one-on-ones
on my mind, you know!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Hm, the Tiara or the Triple Crown... That's a hard
choice...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
But I get the feelin' the Kikuka Sho's a little too
long for me.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
If I remember right, the final stretch of the
Nakayama Racecourse is short but extremely
steep...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
My specialty is closing the gap during the
eleventh hour, so I might be better off at
Hanshin.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Guess that'll put the Oka Sho first on my list. All
right, time to go wild on the Tiara tour!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
But hang on now! Brian will definitely choose the
Triple Crown tour, won't she?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
She's already been picked up by the news as the
best choice for the Triple Crown champion, and
long distances are her forte.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
I wonder if I'd be able to have a real one-on-one
with her if I go for the Triple Crown tour instead...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Ngh...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Argh! I don't know what to do!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her commitment to making this year a good one
has caused her to suffer a rare bout of intense
indecision.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It might be best to have a change of pace before
revisiting the issue of her race schedule.
choice_data_list: How about we make some udon noodles?
Let's take things easy for now.
Let's do some fun New Year's activities!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Make udon? Now? What, as a way to take my
mind off things or somethin'?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
I like that idea! Makin' udon's sure to make me
feel better!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
We've got ingredients back at the dorm, so I'll go
grab them real quick!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And that's how we suddenly end up making udon
noodles...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Guh! I'm not done yet! Nobody wants mushy
udon!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna make these the chewiest, bounciest
noodles anyone's ever had! Raaargh!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: We end up with some very chewy noodles indeed.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Take things easy?! No one's got the time to—
choice_data_list:
Let's just take a little break so you can clear
your mind.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: I mean, I get that, but...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Actually... I just realized I tell my dorm residents
the same thing in order to calm 'em down...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Fine, okay! I'll empty my head right out!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: ...The weather sure is nice today.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Man, lounging around like this is making me feel
sleepy...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And so, we spend the rest of our day relaxing.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
What, now? And forget all the serious talk we just
had?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
...Well, I probably should. All this fussin' isn't
doing me any good. All right, that's enough for
now!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
You're on, Teach! I love New Year's games. I've
played a few before.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Whaddya wanna do? Spin tops? Fly a kite? Try a
round of fukuwarai? Or how about a board game?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: What?! I rolled another one?! I'm not gettin' anywhere, dang it!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
I'm not givin' up, though! It's not over till its over!
I'm gonna roll a six next for sure! I just know it!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Rattle, rattle...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: It's a one!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, we spend the whole day relaxing and
playing games.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We decide to talk about our agenda for the year
another day.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It might be off to a bit of a rough start, but my
new year with Hishi Amazon has officially begun!
